Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..zA8R9LOnqvFnqSYFnHiNV4dWWl0-IZhWQchhVkbPlqc"

echo "=== Find pending workflow tasks ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/workflows/tasks/?status=pending" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 2>/dev/null | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | head -30)

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..zA8R9LOnqvFnqSYFnHiNV4dWWl0-IZhWQchhVkbPlqc"

echo "=== All tasks ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/workflows/tasks/" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 2>/dev/null | python -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
results = data.get\('results', data\) if isinstance\(data, dict\) else data
if isinstance\(results, list\):
    for t in results[-5:]:
        print\(f'Task {t[\\"id\\"]}: status={t.get\(\\"status\\"\)}, step={t.get\(\\"step_name\\"\)}, instance={t.get\(\\"workflow_instance\\"\)}'\)
else:
    print\(results\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..zA8R9LOnqvFnqSYFnHiNV4dWWl0-IZhWQchhVkbPlqc"

TASK_ID="fa5a5ec0-f628-4a29-869a-177aeeabd09d"

echo "=== PHASE 4: Approve via workflow task ==="
curl -s -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}" -X POST "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/workflows/tasks/$TASK_ID/complete/" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"action":"approve","comment":"Procedure looks good. Approved."}' 2>/dev/null)
